zh.Pantyllongdy, Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯福林爾利納亞薩
zh.of Pant-y-llwyn Ddû, Llanasa, Flintshire: 威爾士福林爾利納亞薩
zh.Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales: 威爾士福林爾利納亞薩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Griffith Fychan於1505年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾利納亞薩時，他的父親Thomas ap Griffith26歲，母親Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd21歲。他於1528年與Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn在英國威爾斯福林爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年在英國威爾斯福林爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.Pantyllongdy, Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯福林爾利納亞薩
zh-hans.of Pant-y-llwyn Ddû, Llanasa, Flintshire: 威尔士福林爾利納亞薩
zh-hans.Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales: 威尔士福林爾利納亞薩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Griffith Fychan于1505年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾利納亞薩时，他的父亲Thomas ap Griffith26岁，母亲Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd21岁。他于1528年与Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn在英国威尔斯福林爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年在英国威尔斯福林爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gruffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Griffith Fychan was born in 1505, in Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas ap Griffith, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd, was 21. He married Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn in 1528, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1558, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.Pantyllongdy, Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales: Llanasa, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Griffith Fychan est né en 1505, à Llanasa, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas ap Griffith, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn en 1528, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1558, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Griffith Fychan 1505 in Llanasa, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas ap Griffith 26 und seine Mutter Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd 21. Er hat 1528 in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1558 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Griffith Fychan è nato il nel 1505 nel Llanasa, Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas ap Griffith, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn nel 1528, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1558, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Griffith Fychanが1505年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアラナサで生まれた時，父Thomas ap Griffithは26歳，母Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffyddは21歳であった。1528年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアでDows verch Richard Hywel Mostynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Griffith Fychan(이)가 1505년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 랜아사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas ap Griffith(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1528년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Griffith Fychan nasceu em 1505, em Llanasa, Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas ap Griffith, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn em 1528, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1558, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Griffith Fychan родился в 1505 г. в местности лланаса, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas ap Griffith было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn в 1528 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1558 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Griffith Fychan nació en 1505, en Llanasa, Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas ap Griffith, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. Thomas Ap Gruffydd, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Dows verch Richard Hywel Mostyn en 1528, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1558, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
